name: Cocoa-Mallow Cookie-Wiches
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Pillsbury Chocolate Lovers II
Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease cookie sheets.
In a large bowl, combine sugar, butter, vanilla, and egg; blend well. Add milk and mix until combined.
Sift flour into a measuring cup and level off. Stir in the remaining ingredients; mix until just combined.
Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls onto prepared cookie sheets, spacing about 2 inches apart.
Bake for 7 to 9 minutes or until edges are set. Let cool on sheets for 1 minute before removing.
Filling: In a large bowl, combine all filling ingredients and beat until light and fluffy, about 2 minutes.
Place two cookies flat side together and spread with tablespoon of filling in the middle.
Wrap tightly and store at room temperature. Makes approximately 30 sandwiches.
